name: Ancient Egyptians
teaser: Bury cards for use in the future and gain benefits from burying and uncovering cards.
mechanics: Bury cards for use in the future and gain benefits from burying and uncovering cards.

name: Cowboys
teaser: Start duels with other players' minions to get rid of them, and greatly boost your own power to win duels.
mechanics: Start duels with other players' minions to get rid of them, and greatly boost your own power to win duels.

name: Samurai
teaser: Get various benefits whenever your minions go to the discard pile from play.
mechanics: Get various benefits whenever your minions go to the discard pile from play.

name: Vikings
teaser: Steal other players' cards and gain power at the cost of placing cards from your hand on the top of your deck.
mechanics: Steal other players' cards and gain power at the cost of placing cards from your hand on the top of your deck.
